title: Visa processing times by month :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Visa processing times by month
Detailed data is available on our processing times for various student, work, visitor and residence visas.
This page contains visa processing times for the past 6 months. If you are planning to apply for a visa, there is more up-to-date information about how long it takes for us to process visas:
How long it takes to process an application

## Visitor visa processing times
Processing times are grouped by the type of visitor visa.
- Latest data This table displays the number of work days to decide Visitor Visa applications processed in the last 4 weeks. Table 1: Wait times for Visitor Visa applications processed in the last 4 weeks Median (50% of applications) 80% of applications 90% of applications 4 9 13 Monthly data This table displays the number of work days to decide Visitor Visa applications.
